description: Mini scanner rules config. Original rule descriptions preserved (Phase guardrails intact). Kill_patterns added Session 3 for hard-block functionality.

min_score.description: Minimum score to pass. SA = second attempt threshold. DO NOT activate until 30 resolved signals show score correlates with WR.

regime_alignment.description: PERMANENTLY DISABLED — backtest proves Bear regime UP_TRI is highest conviction trade (avg 4.85%). Activating this rule kills the best signals. Never enable without explicit backtest evidence per signal type.

require_volume.description: vol_confirm must be true. Do not activate until Phase 1 shows volume correlates with WR.

grade_gate.description: Only listed grades pass. Phase 2 candidate after Grade A vs B WR comparison.

clean_air.description: Clean air above target required. Phase 2 candidate.

delivery_volume.description: Phase 3 only — delivery_pct filter. Requires NSE Bhavcopy scraping. Do not activate yet.

kill_patterns.reason: 0/11 WR live (Phase B pattern miner). Avg P&L -11.12%, MFE 0% — every trade went against immediately.

notes.rules: Existing 6-rule system from mini_scanner.py DEFAULT_RULES. Each rule has 'active' field. Set to true to activate. Zero Python changes needed. Rules block signals ONLY in active mode — shadow mode lets all pass but logs hits. See each rule's description for phase-based activation guardrails.
notes.kill_patterns: NEW (Session 3). Hard-blocks signals matching signal+sector combo REGARDLESS of shadow_mode. Different from 'rules' above — rules are conditional based on shadow_mode, kill_patterns are absolute. When matched, also triggers contra_tracker.record() to log inverted shadow trade. Each kill_pattern has independent 'active' field for disabling without removing.
notes.warn_patterns: NEW (Session 3, placeholder). Signals matching these pass but flagged with caution. Not yet implemented.
notes.boost_patterns: NEW (Session 3, placeholder). Signals matching these receive score boost. Not yet implemented.
notes.shadow_mode: When true, rule system lets all signals pass to mini_log. Used during initial data collection. Kill_patterns bypass shadow_mode and block unconditionally.
